name: njse22
title: Telecommunications Engineer
bio: Research Assistant at the Informatics and Telecommunications Research Group (i2t) and the Center for Research in Technology and Health (CENIT) at Universidad Icesi. My research is primarily focused on signal processing, data analytics, and Artificial Intelligence applied to telecommunications and Software-Defined Radio (SDR). I also develop telemedicine systems for monitoring neurodegenerative diseases, primary to Parkinson's, leveraging various embedded systems, microcontrollers, and IoT platforms. Additionally, I have served as a technical consultant for the National Spectrum Agency (ANE), defining critical technical parameters for the operation of national telecommunication systems. As an academic mentor, I co-tutor, tutor, and provide technical advisement for undergraduate engineering projects focused on developing custom platforms, tools, and machine learning models for the healthcare and telecom sectors.
